news.title: Onze recensent ging eten bij De Beren: veilige klassiekers, zoete caloriebommen en schokkende prijzen - De Telegraaf
news.summary:
# Summary

A food critic reviewed **De Beren** restaurant and found it offers reliable classic dishes alongside overly sweet desserts, but with surprisingly high prices. Visitors to the city should be aware that while the restaurant serves safe, well-executed comfort food, the cost may not justify the quality and portion sizes offered.

news.title: Sergio Herman stopt met zijn 2 restaurants in Antwerpen: "Terugkeren naar natuur en mezelf" - VRT
news.summary:
# Summary

Renowned chef Sergio Herman is closing both of his restaurants in Antwerp, Belgium, citing a desire to return to nature and reconnect with himself. This is significant for food tourists visiting Antwerp, as it means the loss of two notable dining establishments from the city's culinary scene. Herman's decision reflects a shift in priorities away from the restaurant business toward a more personal, nature-focused lifestyle.
